method: Read-only GitHub metadata via gh repo view on 2026-06-15 Europe/Sofia; no account, browser, public, payment, wallet, legal, KYC, or real-money action.
next_local_builds: service_worker_request.v1 schema with worker_type, risk_gate, approval_scope, external_side_effects_allowed, credential_boundary, result_artifact_path, and replay_policy
openinference_trace_export_plan.v1 mapping current trace_events rows to span-like fields without sending telemetry externally
durable_queue_adapter_spike.v1 comparing DBOS and Hatchet against one existing local work_packet.v1 with no external calls

recommendations.decision: Keep E:\agent-company-lab SQLite as CEO/control-plane source of truth
recommendations.why: It already owns lanes, tasks, service requests, artifacts, outcomes, and trace events; replacing it with a framework would erase governance instead of scaling it.

recommendations.decision: Add a service_worker_request.v1 contract before adding more browser/account workers
recommendations.why: The lab needs repeatable request/approval/execution/result records for registration, browser research, KYC/legal/payment, wallet, and submission desks. Browser-use/Skyvern/Playwright MCP should sit behind this contract.

recommendations.decision: Promote DBOS then Hatchet as the next durable execution candidates
recommendations.why: DBOS matches Python plus database-backed durable workflows; Hatchet adds queue/concurrency controls for service desks. Temporal is powerful but likely too heavy before distributed workers exist.

recommendations.decision: Use AG-UI/CopilotKit concepts for the human CEO console
recommendations.why: The missing interface is not another chat transcript; it is a stream of agent state, tool calls, approvals, blockers, and lane metrics that a human can review.
The current trace table is good locally; aligning span fields now will make later Langfuse/Phoenix export straightforward.

recommendations.decision: Keep framework choice per worker, not global
recommendations.why: Seekers, managers, browser workers, evaluators, and data-ingestion agents have different needs. The control plane should dispatch typed packets to adapters rather than standardizing on one agent framework.

repos.name: openai/openai-agents-python
repos.role: reference Python runtime adapter for seekers/managers; useful for handoffs, tools, tracing-shaped local manifests

repos.name: langchain-ai/langgraph
repos.role: stateful graph runtime for resilient manager/seeker flows and long-running review loops

repos.name: pydantic/pydantic-ai
repos.role: typed agent contracts, schemas, eval/test-model path for safe local workers

repos.name: microsoft/agent-framework
repos.role: enterprise-style Python/.NET multi-agent workflows; useful signal for cross-language department workers

repos.name: microsoft/autogen
repos.role: established multi-agent conversation framework; useful for research comparison, less favored for new control-plane dependency

repos.name: google/adk-python
repos.role: code-first agent toolkit with evaluation/deployment framing; useful for manager and service-worker design patterns

repos.name: strands-agents/harness-sdk
repos.role: production harness framing; useful signal for end-to-end worker control, model/cloud portability, MCP integration

repos.name: run-llama/llama_index
repos.role: document/data agent layer for research ingestion, source memory, RAG over ledgers and reports

repos.name: crewAIInc/crewAI
repos.role: role-playing collaborative agents; useful for department metaphors, less central than our ledger for governance

repos.name: agno-agi/agno
repos.role: agent platform management framing; useful as product inspiration for agent registries and runtime surfaces

repos.name: mastra-ai/mastra
repos.role: TypeScript agent/workflow/eval stack; useful if browser/product workers move to Node services

repos.name: CopilotKit/CopilotKit
repos.role: frontend stack for human-in-the-loop agent operations and AG-UI-adjacent control room patterns

repos.name: ag-ui-protocol/ag-ui
repos.role: Agent-User Interaction protocol for streaming state/tool/human approval events into a control room

repos.name: modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol
repos.role: tool/resource protocol; service desk adapters should expose approved local tools through MCP-like contracts

repos.name: a2aproject/A2A
repos.role: agent-to-agent interoperability protocol; useful later for cross-thread/opaque worker contracts

repos.name: browser-use/browser-use
repos.role: high-velocity browser automation worker candidate; must remain behind browser_read_only/service gates

repos.name: Skyvern-AI/skyvern
repos.role: workflow/RPA-style browser worker candidate; AGPL license requires care before embedding

repos.name: microsoft/playwright-mcp
repos.role: MCP server for browser operations; useful for read-only browser desk after explicit approval

repos.name: temporalio/temporal
repos.role: heavyweight durable workflow backbone when local SQLite/CLI needs distributed retries and worker fleets

repos.name: dbos-inc/dbos-transact-py
repos.role: best near-term fit for Python/SQLite/Postgres durable workflows; aligns with current ledger-first architecture

repos.name: hatchet-dev/hatchet
repos.role: background tasks, durable workflows, concurrency controls for service desks and lane worker queues

repos.name: inngest/inngest
repos.role: stateful event functions; useful if we shift from CLI queue to event-driven service request handling

repos.name: triggerdotdev/trigger.dev
repos.role: managed/self-hosted AI workflow pattern for productized workers; less immediate than DBOS/Hatchet for local lab

repos.name: PrefectHQ/prefect
repos.role: data/research pipeline orchestrator; useful for source freshness and recurring scouts, not agent runtime

repos.name: dagster-io/dagster
repos.role: asset lineage/data pipeline option for research corpora and generated datasets

repos.name: nats-io/nats-server
repos.role: later-stage event bus for many workers; not needed before DB queue saturation

repos.name: langfuse/langfuse
repos.role: LLM observability, evals, prompt management; useful as external reference while local trace_events remains source of truth

repos.name: Arize-ai/phoenix
repos.role: AI observability/evaluation workbench; good candidate for trace/eval export target

repos.name: Arize-ai/openinference
repos.role: OpenTelemetry instrumentation vocabulary for agent/tool/model spans; should shape local trace schema exports
